---
title: "Streaming Engagement Report"
subtitle: "Weekly Performance ┬Ę MENA"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-title: "Sections"
    embed-resources: true        # single self-contained file ŌĆö key for sharing
    page-layout: full
    css: glossy.css              # or inline the <style> block below
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(ggplot2); library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(scales)
library(gganimate); library(gt); library(reactable); library(plotly)

pal <- list(bg="#0E1320", ink="#EEF1F7", muted="#8B95A8", grid="#1E2638",
            gold="#F5C518", gold_d="#B8920F", violet="#8B7BF0", teal="#27C2B6")

theme_glossy <- function(base_size = 13) {
  theme_minimal(base_size) %+replace% theme(
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = pal$bg, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = pal$bg, color = NA),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = pal$grid, linewidth = .4),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(color = pal$ink), axis.text = element_text(color = pal$muted),
    plot.title = element_text(color = "#fff", face = "bold", size = base_size*1.4, hjust = 0),
    legend.position = "top", legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = pal$bg, color = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = pal$bg, color = NA))
}
```

<!-- Inline theming so the whole page is glossy even without glossy.css -->
```{=html}
<style>
:root{--bg:#070A12;--panel:#0E1320;--line:#1E2638;--ink:#EEF1F7;--muted:#8B95A8;--gold:#F5C518}
body{background:radial-gradient(1200px 600px at 80% -10%,rgba(245,197,24,.10),transparent 60%),var(--bg);
  color:var(--ink);font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif}
.quarto-title-block .title{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff,#C8CEDC);-webkit-background-clip:text;
  background-clip:text;color:transparent;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.02em}
h2{border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);padding-bottom:.3em}
#TOC,nav{color:var(--muted)} a{color:var(--gold)}
.cell-output img{border-radius:12px}
</style>
```

## 01 ┬Ę Engagement trend

```{r}
set.seed(42)
days <- seq(as.Date("2026-06-09"), as.Date("2026-06-15"), by="day")
markets <- c("Saudi Arabia","UAE","Egypt","Qatar","Kuwait"); base <- c(560,420,390,230,185)*1000
dat <- expand.grid(day=days, market=markets, cohort=c("Target","Control"), stringsAsFactors=FALSE) |>
  group_by(market) |>
  mutate(b=base[match(market,markets)],
         tr=as.numeric(day-min(day))*ifelse(cohort=="Target",.045,.012),
         dau=round(b*(1+tr)*runif(n(),.96,1.05))) |> ungroup()

trend <- dat |> group_by(day, cohort) |> summarise(dau=sum(dau), .groups="drop")
p <- ggplot(trend, aes(day, dau, color=cohort, fill=cohort)) +
  geom_area(data=subset(trend, cohort=="Target"), alpha=.18, color=NA) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype=cohort), linewidth=1.2) + geom_point(size=2.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c(Target=pal$gold, Control=pal$violet)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(Target=pal$gold, Control=pal$violet)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=label_number(scale=1e-6, suffix="M")) +
  labs(title="Daily active viewers", x=NULL, y=NULL) + theme_glossy()
ggplotly(p) |> layout(paper_bgcolor=pal$bg, plot_bgcolor=pal$bg, font=list(color=pal$ink))
```

## 02 ┬Ę Market race (animated)

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4.2
race <- dat |> filter(cohort=="Target") |> group_by(day, market) |>
  summarise(dau=sum(dau), .groups="drop")
a <- ggplot(race, aes(reorder(market, dau), dau, fill=market)) +
  geom_col(width=.72, show.legend=FALSE) + coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values=colorRampPalette(c(pal$gold, pal$violet, pal$teal))(5)) +
  labs(title="Market race ŌĆö {format(frame_time,'%b %d')}", x=NULL, y="Daily active") +
  theme_glossy() + transition_time(day) + ease_aes("cubic-in-out")
animate(a, width=760, height=400, fps=18, duration=7,
        renderer=gifski_renderer(), bg=pal$bg)   # Quarto embeds the GIF automatically
```

## 03 ┬Ę Market detail

```{r}
tbl <- dat |> filter(day==max(day)) |> group_by(market) |>
  summarise(dau=sum(dau), .groups="drop") |> arrange(desc(dau))
reactable(tbl, sortable=TRUE, highlight=TRUE,
  theme=reactableTheme(color=pal$ink, backgroundColor=pal$bg,
    borderColor=pal$grid, highlightColor="#1a2335",
    headerStyle=list(color=pal$muted, textTransform="uppercase", fontSize="11px")),
  columns=list(dau=colDef(name="Daily Active", format=colFormat(separators=TRUE))))
```

<!--
Render from a Databricks R cell:
  rmarkdown::render("engagement_report.qmd",
                    output_file="/Volumes/catalog/schema/reports/report.html")
embed-resources:true gives ONE portable .html with all images/widgets inlined.
-->
